parse.title: Jak'Sho, The Protean
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item, see {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue =
{{gold value|Voidborn Resilience Gold Value|nolink=}} 
* 13.5 [[armor]] = {{g|{{#expr:{{#var:armor}}*13.5}}}}
* 13.5 [[magic resistance]] = {{g|{{#expr:{{#var:mr}}*13.5}}}}
** '''Total Gold Value''' = {{g|{{#vardefineecho:voidborn|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:armor}}*13.5+{{#var:mr}}*13.5}}}}}}
|goldefficiency = 
* While '''Voidborn Resilience''' is active, {{iis|Jak'Sho, The Protean}} gold efficiency is increased to {{gec|Jak'Sho, The Protean|{{#var:voidborn}}}} by its own {{as|bonus armor}} and {{as|bonus magic resistance}} and further increased by an additional {{gec|Jak'Sho, The Protean|+{{#var:armor}}*0.3}} for every 1 {{as|bonus armor}} and additional {{gec|Jak'Sho, The Protean|+{{#var:mr}}*0.3}} for every 1 {{as|bonus magic resistance}} obtained from other sources.
|similaritems = Force of Nature
|background = 
|notes = 
|strategy = 
* The first instance of combat will generate the maximum number of stacks for {{sbc|Voidborn Resilence}}.
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
* This item had a placeholder icon and its name on [[VPBE|PBE]] for the initial Preseason 2023 cycle was ''Icathia's Endurance''.
** The name of its Masterwork item was ''Inevitable Assimilation''.
* If the user of this item finishes the match with a good performance, there is a small chance an automated message is sent in the game chat with them being killed shortly after.
** The message reads: ''"Jak'Sho deems (user's summoner name) worthy and has absorbed their power!!"''
** This death will self-claim shut down bounties, but does not count towards the death score count of [[KDA]].

[[File:Void Crest icon.png|link=Void#Trivia|100px|center]]

|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V14.19]]
* {{sbc|New Recipe:}} {{ii|Giant's Belt}} + {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{g|650}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Old Recipe:}} {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{ii|Ruby Crystal}} + {{g|1100}} = {{g|3200}}.
* Health increased to 350 from 300.
* Armor reduced to 45 from 50.
* Magic resistance reduced to 45 from 50.

;[[V14.11]]
* Can no longer be upgraded to {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}}.

;[[V14.2]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}} no longer incorrectly grants 25 ability haste.

;[[V14.1]]
* {{sbc|New:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Chain Vest}} + {{ii|Negatron Cloak}} + {{ii|Ruby Crystal}} + {{g|1100}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 300 health, 50 armor, 50 magic resistance.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Voidborn Resilience:}} Entering combat with enemy champions grants a stack every second, up to 5 stacks. At '''maximum''' stacks, increase your {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} by 30% until the end of combat.
** Limited to 1 '''Jak'Sho, The Protean'''.
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 550 health, 60 armor, 60 magic resistance.
** {{sbc|Caption:}} "He has been called many things. A carapace helm. A second skin. A living tomb..."
* {{sbc|Old:}}
** {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Aegis of the Legion}} + {{ii|Kindlegem}} + {{ii|Ruby Crystal}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|3200}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 400 health, 30 armor, 30 magic resistance, 20 ability haste.
** {{sbc|Unique Passive - Voidborn Resilience:}} For each second in combat with champions, gain 2 {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} for 6 seconds, stacking up to 8 times for a total of 16 '''bonus''' resistances. Upon reaching maximum stacks, instantly deal {{as|80|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 7% '''bonus''' health)}} {{as|magic damage}} to enemy champions within 700 units and {{tip|heal}} for the same amount for each target damaged. You then increase your '''bonus''' resistances by 20% until the end of combat.
** {{sbc|Mythic Passive:}} Empowers each of your other Legendary items with {{as|5 armor}} and {{as|5 magic resistance}}.
** Limited to 1 {{sbc|Mythic}} item.
** {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}}.
*** {{sbc|Stats:}} 550 health, 40 armor, 40 magic resistance, 25 ability haste.
** {{sbc|Caption:}} "He has been called many things. A carapace helm. A second skin. A living tomb..."

;[[V13.14]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} No longer is sometimes able to grant stacks of Voidborn Resilience while the user is dead.

;[[V13.4]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Tooltip now displays the damage value as its scaling rather than its calculated damage value.

;[[V13.1]]
* Total cost increased to {{g|3200}} from {{g|3100}}.
** Combine cost increased {{g|800}} from {{g|700}}.
* Increased resistances at maximum stacks changed to 20% '''bonus''' resistances from 15% '''total''' resistances.
* {{sbc|New Effect:}} Drain now has a base damage of 80. 
* Drain health ratio changed to {{as|7% '''bonus''' health}} from {{as|3% '''maximum''' health}}.
* {{sbc|Removed:}} No longer damages non-champions.

;[[V12.23#December 14th Hotfix|V12.23]] - December 14th Hotfix
* Total cost increased to {{g|3100}} from {{g|3000}}.
** Combine cost increased to {{g|700}} from {{g|600}}.
* Bonus resistances per stack reduced to 2 from 3.
** Maximum bonus resistance reduced to 16 from 24.

;[[V12.23]]
* {{sbc|Removed:}} No longer generates stacks of Voidborn Resilience while dead.
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} Percentage resistances increase now properly calculates with other resistances increase modifiers.

;[[V12.22#November 17th Hotfix|V12.22]] - November 17th Hotfix
* Bonus resistances per stack increased to 3 from 2.
** Maximum bonus resistances increased to 24 from 16.
* Increased resistances at maximum stacks increased to 15% from 10%.

;[[V12.22]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Aegis of the Legion}} + {{ii|Kindlegem}} + {{ii|Ruby Crystal}} + {{g|600}} = {{g|3000}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 400 health, 30 armor, 30 magic resistance, 20 ability haste.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Voidborn Resilience:}} For each second in combat with champions, gain 2 {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} for 6 seconds, stacking up to 8 times for a maximum of 16 '''bonus''' resistances. At maximum stacks, instantly deal {{as|3% '''maximum''' health}} {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within 700 units, reduced to {{as|1%|health}} against non-champions, {{tip|heal}} for the same amount for each enemy damaged, and increase your '''total''' resistances by 10% until the end of combat (60 second cooldown).
* {{sbc|Mythic Passive:}} Empowers other Legendary items with {{as|5 '''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|5 '''bonus''' magic resistance}}.
* Limited to 1 {{sbc|Mythic}} item.
* {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|The Unspoken Parasite}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 550 health, 40 armor, 40 magic resistance, 25 ability haste.
}}
